word: H672 - אֶפְרָת - ʼEphrâth - ef-rawth' - Once perhaps for Ephraim; also of an Israelitish woman; Ephrath

sections.paragraph: Short Definition: Once perhaps for Ephraim; also of an Israelitish woman; Ephrath

אפרתה    אפרת - 'ephrâth 'ephrâthâh - ef-rawth', ef-raw'-thaw

From H6509; fruitfulness; Ephrath, another name for Bethlehem; once used in Psa 132:6 perhaps for Ephraim; also of an Israelitish woman: - Ephrath, Ephratah.
